Title: Char Count Sim
Problem_Statement: Simulate counting characters in file. Read a word and print character count.

Title: Line Count Sim
Problem_Statement: Read integer N representing lines in file and print N.

Title: Digit Count Sim
Problem_Statement: Read word simulating file content. Print count of digit characters.

Title: Vowel Count Sim
Problem_Statement: Read lowercase word simulating file content. Print count of vowels.

Title: Uppercase Count Sim
Problem_Statement: Read word simulating file content. Print count of uppercase letters.

Title: Starts With Vowel Sim
Problem_Statement: Read lowercase word. Print Yes if file starts with vowel else No.

Title: Ends With Period Sim
Problem_Statement: Read string. Print Yes if ends with '.' else No.

Title: Has Number Sim
Problem_Statement: Read word. Print Yes if contains any digit else No.

Title: Consonant Count Sim
Problem_Statement: Read lowercase alphabetic word. Print count of consonants.

Title: File Size Bytes Sim
Problem_Statement: Read string. Assume 1 byte per char. Print file size in bytes.

Title: Copy Sim
Problem_Statement: Simulate file copy. Read word and print exact copy.

Title: Find Word Sim
Problem_Statement: Read two words space separated (content and query). Print Found if equal else Not Found.

Title: Replace Char Sim
Problem_Statement: Read word. Replace all 'a' with '@' and print.

Title: Reverse Line Sim
Problem_Statement: Read word representing line and print reversed.

Title: Check Empty Sim
Problem_Statement: Read integer N representing file length. Print Empty if N == 0 else Not Empty.

Title: Count Specific Char Sim
Problem_Statement: Read word and query char space separated. Print frequency of query char.

Title: Longest Word Sim
Problem_Statement: Read two words space separated. Print length of the longer word.

Title: Average Word Length Sim
Problem_Statement: Read two words space separated. Compute total length divided by 2 (integer average) and print.

Title: Remove Vowels Sim
Problem_Statement: Read lowercase word. Remove all vowels and print remaining string.

Title: Count Words Sim
Problem_Statement: Read integer N representing word count in file and print N.

Title: Copy File Contents
Problem_Statement:
Write a C program to copy contents of one file to another file.
Simulated via standard I/O: Read number of lines N. Then read N lines of text representing source file. Print exact copy of text representing destination file.

Title: Merge Two Streams Sim
Problem_Statement: Read word1 word2 space separated. Print merged string word1word2.

Title: Extract Numbers Sum Sim
Problem_Statement: Read two integers representing extracted numbers from file. Print their sum.

Title: Encrypt Shift Sim
Problem_Statement: Read lowercase word. Shift each letter by +1 (z->a) and print encrypted text.

Title: Decrypt Shift Sim
Problem_Statement: Read lowercase word. Shift each letter by -1 (a->z) and print decrypted text.

Title: Line Numbering Sim
Problem_Statement: Read word representing line text. Print with line number prefix '1: <word>'.
